body.title: CLOSED: agentctl init — set CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS and run skills-sync on first install
body.result: agentctl init now detects CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS, writes to shell profile (idempotent), runs skills deploy on init; graceful skip when lab/claudecode not in agent_datacenter yet (commit 47f8f65)
body.description:
agentctl init (agent_datacenter installer device) is near-empty and doesn't set AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME or CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS env vars, nor does it install skills. Extend the init flow: detect install path, write env vars to shell profile (~/.bashrc / ~/.zshrc), optionally run skills-sync to install canonical skills into ~/.claude/skills/. This is the 'complete illiterates can install' entry point per installer-bootstrap.md decision.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/installer/device.py (currently near-empty — Phase 4 target per D-adc-phase-0-2026-04-27).
**Design rules:** No TheIgors imports. Phase 4 target is agentctl init per existing installer-bootstrap decision. No WSL dependency.
**Scope boundary:** IN: env var writing to shell profile on Linux/macOS, skills-sync invocation on first install. OUT: Postgres setup (separate concern in installer bootstrap doc), Windows (later).
**Test plan:** Run agentctl init on a clean shell profile; source profile; echo $AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME and echo $CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS return correct paths; ~/.claude/skills/ contains canonical skill set.
**Pass condition:** Fresh shell after agentctl init has both env vars set and skills installed; no manual path editing required by the user.
